prompt: Create a highly realistic casual mirror selfie of a young East Asian woman standing in a minimalist beige bedroom, photographed vertically on a smartphone. She has long dark brown slightly wavy hair and a slim figure, with her face intentionally obscured by a soft square blur for privacy. She is wearing a white ribbed camisole with lace trim and a small bow, an oversized cream chunky knit cardigan slipping off one shoulder, and light blue high-waisted denim shorts with frayed hems. Her pose is relaxed and fashionable, one shoulder exposed, one hand raised near her face with the sweater sleeve covering part of her hand, looking like a natural social media outfit photo rather than a studio portrait. The room has warm neutral lighting, a cream sofa behind her, plain off-white walls, a few small photo prints taped to the wall, a narrow black-framed full-length mirror visible at the edges, a glass side table on the right, and a soft beige rug. Use realistic proportions, natural skin texture, soft indoor daylight, muted tones, shallow everyday smartphone quality, and an authentic non-AI Japanese lifestyle aesthetic.
